constructors.name: Operation
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Operation class

methods.name: MoveAnalysisPartAreaEdge
methods.summary: Moves the analysis part area edge by translation vector. Perpendicular offset is calculated from the translation vector.

methods.name: MoveAnalysisPartPosition
methods.summary: Moves the analysis part position by translation vector. Only the handle positions can be moved.

methods.name: MoveObject
methods.summary: Moves the analysis object by translation vector. Supported objects are: AnalysisNode, AnalysisPart.

methods.name: ResetAnalysisPartPositions
methods.summary: Reset analysis part. Removes the offsets applied to node positions. The axis offset of the analysis part is not reset.
